description_long: This is a modern, compact assault rifle with a matte dark blue and green camouflage finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a short, vented handguard with a visible barrel and a flash hider at the muzzle. The receiver is detailed with subtle engravings and a detachable box magazine is inserted in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver includes a rail system for mounting optics, though only basic iron sights are present. The overall design is streamlined for urban tactical use, with a robust polymer and metal construction. The rifle's proportions and features suggest it is modeled after the M4 or AR-15 platform, commonly used in military and law enforcement scenarios.
description: A compact, camouflaged assault rifle with a collapsible stock, pistol grip, and short barrel, designed for tactical urban use. Features include a detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the rifle's details from the other side.
